channel.title: Posts on Dhiraj Balakrishnan
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Dhiraj Balakrishnan

item.title: Perfection is Overrated
item.description: Practice makes Perfect I have a confession to make, I have been writing and re-writing this post for over two months now. During this interim, the blog’s title has changed thrice and the blog content has changed so much that the initial draft is nowhere close to this post. Having said this, you might be wondering why, and I don’t blame you for it. After all, this has been a real pain point for me and at one point I thought this is impossible for me to accomplish.
